title: Pinguinmike,s Dragon Toy (Better To Play/MVS)
description: The Ender Dragon Toy from the Better to Play (MVS) mod as a mod for many other versions!
body:
The Pinguinmike,s Dragon Toy Mod ports the (already called) **"Dragon Toy"** from the **"Better To Play (MVS)"** Mod for many Minecraft versions and is a nice deco block with function for your base.

**This modification is in following versions available:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Fabric:
1.19.2, 1.20.1, 1.21.8

NeoForge:
1.20.1, 1.20.4, 1.20.6, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.5, 1.21.8, 26.1.2

Forge:
1.12.2, 1.14.4, 1.15.2, 1.16.5, 1.17.1, 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.19.4, 1.20.1

</details>
